title: To Mr. Syme.
content:
No more of your guests, be they titled or not,
            And cook'ry the first in the nation;
        Who is proof to thy personal converse and wit,
            Is proof to all other temptation.
meaning:
Robert Burns's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "To Mr. Syme."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
